ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL( Reason_for_Closed__c , "Qualified"), OR( ISBLANK( Size_in_sqfts__c ), ISPICKVAL( Size_in_sqft__c ,""), ISPICKVAL( Type_of_Unit__c,"" ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: All of the following fields are required: Size Required, Size Range, and Size (in sqft).
